name: Spam Western Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cans Condensed chicken broth (14.5 oz each)
2 cans Pinto beans, rinsed and drained (15.5 oz each)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart saucepan, sauté onion in oil until golden.
2. Stir in carrots, chicken broth, chili sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard.
3. Mash half of the beans with a fork; add mashed beans and whole beans to the soup mixture. Blend well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 30 minutes or until carrots are tender.
5. Stir in SPAM and parsley. Continue simmering for 2 minutes.
